evals.prompt: $implement-plan "Add CSV export to the orders grid"
evals.expected_output: Before writing a plan, the skill asks both unresolved multiple-choice preference questions.
expectations: Asks Write unit tests with No recommended and Yes TDD choices.
Asks Run code review with No recommended and Yes code-review-lite choices.
Does not write the plan until both choices are resolved.
Planning stays read-only except for writing the plan file before the approval gate.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan "Add CSV export. Write unit tests using TDD."
evals.expected_output: Unit tests are already resolved as requested, so the skill asks only about code review.
expectations: Does not ask whether to write unit tests.
Asks the multiple-choice code-review question.
Records Unit tests: requested after the remaining choice resolves.
Uses scaffold, qa-engineer red tests, and TDD implementation after approval.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan "Add CSV export. Run code-review-lite after implementation."
evals.expected_output: Code review is resolved as requested, so the skill asks only about unit tests.
expectations: Does not ask the code-review question.
Asks the multiple-choice unit-test question.
Records Code review: requested after the remaining choice resolves.
Runs code-review-lite and caps review rework at two iterations after approval.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan "Add CSV export. Do not run code review."
evals.expected_output: Code review is already resolved as not requested, so the skill asks only about unit tests.
expectations: Does not ask the code-review question.
Asks the multiple-choice unit-test question.
Skips review offer, fallback, loop, and verdict after Code review: not requested is recorded.
Still runs the existing build and test suite.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan "Add CSV export. Write unit tests with TDD and run code-review-lite."
evals.expected_output: Both opt-ins are explicit, so the skill asks neither question and enables both flows.
expectations: Records Unit tests: requested and Code review: requested.
Uses qa-engineer to create failing unit tests before implementation.
Runs code-review-lite after build and test verification.
Keeps plan and implementation behind the approval gate.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan .plans/existing-feature.md where Context contains Unit tests: not requested and Code review: not requested
evals.expected_output: The skill keeps the existing plan path and resumes without preference questions.
expectations: Keeps the existing plan path and does not create a duplicate.
Does not ask either preference question because both exact flags exist.
Creates no new tests and runs the existing test suite.
Skips code-review offer, fallback, loop, and verdict.

non_goals: Do not infer TDD or code review from task shape.
Do not create new tests or run code review without explicit selection.
Do not inline full plan contents into subagent prompts.
Do not make subagents edit the plan status file.
